2605.07872.title: Video Understanding Reward Modeling: A Robust Benchmark and Performant Reward Models
2605.07872.paper_summary: Multimodal reward models have advanced substantially in text and image domains, yet progress in video understanding reward modeling remains severely limited by the lack of robust evaluation benchmarks and high-quality preference data. To address this, we propose a unified framework spanning benchmark design, data construction, and reward model training. We introduce Video Understanding Reward Bench (VURB), a benchmark featuring 2,100 preference pairs with long chain-of-thought reasoning traces (averaging 1,143 tokens) and majority voting evaluation across general, long, and reasoning-oriented video tasks. We further construct Video Understanding Preference Dataset (VUP-35K) via a fully automated pipeline, providing large-scale high-quality supervision for video reward training. Building on the data, we train VideoDRM and VideoGRM, a discriminative and a generative reward model, both achieving state-of-the-art performance on VURB and VideoRewardBench. Further analysis confirms that VUP-35K enhances both reward performance and model reasoning capability, while VideoDRM and VideoGRM yield significant gains under best-of-$N$ test-time scaling.
2605.07872.paper_summary_zh: 多模態獎勵模型在文本和圖像領域已經取得了顯著進展，但在視頻理解獎勵建模方面的進展仍受到穩健評估基準和高質量偏好數據缺乏的嚴重限制。為了解決這個問題，我們提出了一個統一的框架，涵蓋基準設計、數據構建和獎勵模型訓練。我們介紹了視頻理解獎勵基準（VURB），這是一個包含2,100個偏好對的基準，具有長鏈思考推理痕跡（平均1,143個標記）和針對一般、長期以及以推理為導向的視頻任務的多數投票評估。我們進一步通過完全自動化的管道構建了視頻理解偏好數據集（VUP-35K），為視頻獎勵訓練提供了大規模高質量的監督。在此數據基礎上，我們訓練了VideoDRM和VideoGRM，這是一個判別性和一個生成性獎勵模型，兩者在VURB和VideoRewardBench上均達到最先進的性能。進一步分析確認VUP-35K增強了獎勵性能和模型推理能力，而VideoDRM和VideoGRM在最佳的$N$ 測試時間擴展下產生了顯著的增益。
2605.07872.author: Yuancheng Wei et.al.
2605.07872.authors: Yuancheng Wei, Linli Yao, Lei Li, Haojie Zhang, Hao Zhou, Fandong Meng, Xu Sun
